name: Brevo
shortDescription: All-in-one marketing and CRM platform integration for transactional email, SMS messaging, contact management, and sales pipeline operations. Manage contacts, lists, deals, companies, tasks, and notes through a unified API.

actions.name: Send Transactional Email
actions.description: Send a transactional email to a single recipient with full customization of sender, content, and scheduling options.

actions.name: Send Template Email
actions.description: Send an email using a pre-built Brevo template with dynamic variables and recipient customization.

actions.name: Get Email Templates
actions.description: Retrieve a list of available email templates from your Brevo account with pagination support.

actions.name: Get Transactional Emails
actions.description: Retrieve a list of transactional emails with filtering by recipient, event type, and date range.

actions.name: Get Email Statistics
actions.description: Retrieve aggregated email statistics for transactional emails with optional date range and tag filtering.

actions.name: Get Senders
actions.description: Retrieve all verified email senders configured in your Brevo account.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Create a new contact in Brevo with email, personal details, list assignments, and custom attributes.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific contact by email address, ID, or external ID.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Update an existing contact's information including email, personal details, list memberships, and attributes.

actions.name: Delete Contact
actions.description: Permanently delete a contact from your Brevo account by email address, ID, or external ID.

actions.name: Get Contacts
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all contacts in your Brevo account.

actions.name: Create List
actions.description: Create a new contact list in a specified folder for organizing and managing your contacts.

actions.name: Get Lists
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all contact lists in your Brevo account.

actions.name: Get List Contacts
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts belonging to a specific contact list.

actions.name: Add Contacts to List
actions.description: Add one or more contacts to a specific contact list by their email addresses.

actions.name: Remove Contacts from List
actions.description: Remove one or more contacts from a specific contact list by their email addresses.

actions.name: Send Transactional SMS
actions.description: Send a transactional SMS message to a single recipient with sender customization and tagging.

actions.name: Get SMS Statistics
actions.description: Retrieve aggregated SMS statistics with optional date range and tag filtering.

actions.name: Create Deal
actions.description: Create a new deal in the Brevo CRM with a name and optional attributes such as pipeline, stage, and owner.

actions.name: Get Deal
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific CRM deal by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Update Deal
actions.description: Update an existing CRM deal's name and attributes such as stage, pipeline, owner, or amount.

actions.name: Delete Deal
actions.description: Permanently delete a specific CRM deal by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Get Deals
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all CRM deals in your Brevo account.

actions.name: Create Company
actions.description: Create a new company in the Brevo CRM with a name and optional custom attributes.

actions.name: Get Company
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific company by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Update Company
actions.description: Update an existing company's name and attributes in the Brevo CRM.

actions.name: Delete Company
actions.description: Permanently delete a specific company from the Brevo CRM by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Get Companies
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all companies in the Brevo CRM.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Create a new task in the Brevo CRM with scheduling, notes, and associations to contacts, deals, or companies.

actions.name: Get Task
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific CRM task by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Update an existing CRM task's name, status, scheduling, or notes.

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Permanently delete a specific CRM task by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Get Tasks
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all CRM tasks in your Brevo account.

actions.name: Create Note
actions.description: Create a new note in the Brevo CRM and associate it with contacts, deals, or companies.

actions.name: Get Note
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific CRM note by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Update Note
actions.description: Update an existing CRM note's text content and associated contacts, deals, or companies.

actions.name: Delete Note
actions.description: Permanently delete a specific CRM note by its unique identifier.

actions.name: Get Account Info
actions.description: Retrieve your Brevo account information including plan details, credits, and relay configuration.

idealUseCases: Sending transactional emails and template-based notifications for order confirmations and alerts
Managing contact lists and segmenting audiences for targeted campaigns
Tracking CRM deals through sales pipelines with stage management
Sending transactional SMS messages for time-sensitive notifications
Automating contact creation and updates from external data sources
Managing CRM tasks and notes for sales team coordination
Monitoring email and SMS delivery statistics for reporting
agentIdeas: Use **Parseur** "Get Parsed Data" to extract lead details from incoming emails, then call **Brevo** "Create Contact" to add each lead and "Add Contacts to List" to assign them to a nurture list
When a **Google Sheets** "On New Row" trigger fires with a new order, use **Brevo** "Send Template Email" to send the customer an order confirmation using a pre-built template with dynamic variables

When a **Slack** "On Block Action" trigger fires from a deal-approval button, use **Brevo** "Update Deal" to advance the deal stage in the CRM pipeline and **Slack** "Update Message In Channel" to confirm the action
